themes.reasoning_notes: Megamorph card that repeatedly returns when your permanents are turned face up; a classic morph payoff and sticky threat.
Its face-up trigger brings it back from the graveyard to the battlefield, providing repeatable self-recursion.
Has megamorph itself and its graveyard trigger specifically rewards your permanents being turned face up; this is a premier morph payoff.
Can repeatedly return itself from the graveyard when a permanent you control is turned face up, giving reliable self-recursion in morph shells.
Native deathtouch materially affects combat, but it is secondary to the card's morph-recursion role.
